title: Bandhan Bank is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Bandhan Bank is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Bandhan Bank! We are hiring a Credit Analyst for our Tiruchirappalli team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Bandhan Bank:
Bandhan Bank is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in VBA

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bandhan Bank!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
